demo_project.text: M anar F arghaly A bdelrahman A bdelshafi Haram, Giza LinkedIn | +201205819054 | m.f.abdelshay@gmail.com EDUCATION AND ACADEMIC RECORDS 2021 – 2026 B.S Cairo University, Faculty of Engineering, Giza, Egypt Department of Computer Engineering expected 2026. GPA : 3.3/4.00 2018 – 2021 STEM School , Maadi STEM School, Giza SKILLS • Programming Languages: C++ - C - HTML5 - CSS - Node.js - MSSQL - Python - MATLAB - C# - x86 assembly - ARM Cortex-M3 assembly. • Courses: Object oriented programming “OOP” - Data Structure and Algorithms - Database Design . • Lab Equipment: Spectrum analyzer - Function generator and Oscilloscope. • Languages: English - Arabic “Mother Tongue”. • Soft Skills: Presentation skills - Communication skills - Teamwork. RELEVANT ACADEMIC PROJECTS • CPU Scheduler: In this project the target was designing mini operating system. • Designed functions for processes migration and the sequence of their executing inside the computer. using C++, OOP, and the suitable algorithms of data structure. • Family Forever: Desktop application used to help orphanages. • .NET framework and C# were used in making the view of children's pictures so the user “parent” will be able to select any picture and see information about the chosen child and add him to the favorites, log out, and change password functions. • Pacman Atari-Game: Designed a game console using pure ARM cortex-M3 assembly coding, using STM32 bluebill microcontroller, a 2.8-inch-ili9341 TFT screen and managing input/output buttons. • Designed the logic of winning and collision rules with other elements in the game. • Calculator: Designed a calculator for making the basic operations using logic gates and Logisim. • Speaker Recognition : Analyzed the input signals by extracting features such as Mel-frequency cepstral coefficients (MFCCs) from recorded audios using Python. INTERESTS AND ACTIVITIES July 2021- September 2021 Volunteer in Resala Charity, Giza 2022-2023 Public Relations member in TCCD “Student Activity in Faculty of Engineering” AWARDS • Golden Prize in Kangaroo Math Competition REFERENCES • Available upon request
